name: io.github.webmyc/respira-wordpress
title: Respira WordPress MCP
description: 180+ tools for 12 page builders. Element-level editing, full page creation, HTML-to-builder conversion with rendering fidelity validation, per-site tool governance, snapshots + duplicate-before-edit safety, stock images, bulk operations. Requires the Respira WordPress plugin and a valid license to function.

environmentVariables.name: WORDPRESS_URL
environmentVariables.description: WordPress site URL for the single-site env setup.

environmentVariables.name: WORDPRESS_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Respira API key for the single-site env setup. Generate at wp-admin > Respira > API Keys.

environmentVariables.name: RESPIRA_CONFIG_B64
environmentVariables.description: Base64-encoded multi-site Respira config JSON. Use for managing multiple WordPress sites from one MCP install.

environmentVariables.name: RESPIRA_CONFIG_FILE
environmentVariables.description: Path to a Respira config JSON file (alternative to RESPIRA_CONFIG_B64).
